episodes.title: Overlay
episodes.description: In a city where AR overlays govern access to everything, one glitch exposes a hidden layer.

episodes.title: Ghost Signal
episodes.description: A rogue frequency is broadcasting underneath the licensed AR bands — someone is using dark space.

episodes.title: The Unverified
episodes.description: A growing underclass of people without verified AR identities live in the physical city unseen.

episodes.title: Skin Deep
episodes.description: A designer virus can rewrite AR-linked biometric profiles — and someone is selling it.

episodes.title: Phantom Address
episodes.description: A building that doesn't officially exist keeps appearing in the city's own infrastructure logs.

episodes.title: Mirrored
episodes.description: Two users swap AR identities — one for survival, one for something more sinister.

episodes.title: Kill Switch
episodes.description: A city-wide AR outage plunges millions into a physical reality they've forgotten how to navigate.

episodes.title: System Override
episodes.description: The season finale reveals who controls the hidden layer — and what they've been watching.

episodes.title: New Protocols
episodes.description: The city rebuilds post-outage with tighter controls — and a new enforcement arm.

episodes.title: The Cartels of Light
episodes.description: Criminal networks have migrated entirely into AR space, invisible to physical law enforcement.

episodes.title: Deep Fake City
episodes.description: Entire neighborhoods are being masked by false AR overlays hiding construction — or demolition.

episodes.title: Resistance Protocol
episodes.description: An underground network forms to route around the new enforcement layer.

episodes.title: Signal Breach
episodes.description: The two worlds — physical and augmented — begin to collide in violent ways.

episodes.title: Endgame
episodes.description: The season finale forces a choice: live in the overlay, or tear it all down.

extras.title: Production Design: Building the Overlay
extras.description: How VFX and practical design blended to create the AR world.

extras.title: Writing the Near Future
extras.description: Showrunner interview on the research behind the series' tech concepts.
